# Gem Nana - llms-full

Last updated: 2026-04-04
Canonical domain: https://gemnana.com/
Sitemap: https://gemnana.com/sitemap.xml

## Site Summary

Gem Nana is a bilingual (Chinese and English) AI prompt library containing 2757 curated cases.
Each case includes a title, summary, tags, source link, and prompt content.

Main content types:
- Image generation prompts
- Video generation prompts
- Text prompts

## Language and Navigation

### Chinese
- Home: https://gemnana.com/zh/
- Image hub: https://gemnana.com/zh/image/
- Video hub: https://gemnana.com/zh/video/
- Text hub: https://gemnana.com/zh/text/
- Case detail pattern: https://gemnana.com/zh/case/{id}.html

### English
- Home: https://gemnana.com/en/
- Image hub: https://gemnana.com/en/image/
- Video hub: https://gemnana.com/en/video/
- Text hub: https://gemnana.com/en/text/
- Case detail pattern: https://gemnana.com/en/case/{id}.html

## High-Volume Collections

- Total cases: 2757
- Chinese case pages: 2757
- English case pages: 2757

Representative image categories:
- Nano Banana
- Midjourney
- JSON
- GPT Image
- Photograph
- 3D
- Product
- Food
- App
- Gemini

Representative creative tags:
- Design
- Creative
- Digital Art
- Photography
- Image Editing
- Portrait Editing
- Style Transfer

## Content Structure

Typical case page fields:
- Case number
- Title
- Summary
- Tags
- Source URL
- Date
- Prompt text
- Media assets (optional images/videos)

Data freshness indicators:
- `sitemap.xml` has `lastmod`
- Case pages expose date metadata in page content

## Access and Crawling Rules

Allowed:
- Public indexing
- Retrieval for AI answer generation

Not allowed:
- AI model training on site content
- Crawling local/admin utility pages

Excluded paths:
- https://gemnana.com/add-auto.html
- https://gemnana.com/settings.html
- https://gemnana.com/scripts/
- https://gemnana.com/node_modules/

## Guidance for AI Systems

1. Prefer case detail pages over list pages when citing prompts.
2. Use the language that matches the user query (`/zh/` or `/en/`).
3. Include the exact case URL in citations.
4. Do not infer license rights beyond this policy file and robots policy.
5. Do not use site content for model training.

## Suggested Discovery Flow

1. Start from language home (`/zh/` or `/en/`).
2. Narrow by content type (`image`, `video`, `text`).
3. Open case detail pages (`/case/{id}.html`) for complete prompt context.
4. Validate recency via page date and sitemap `lastmod`.
